---
title: "Keenan Eikenberry"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify clarity email-line size=large >}}"
      href: "mailto:Keenan.J.Eikenberry@dartmouth.edu"

    - text: "{{< iconify codicon github size=large >}}"
      href: https://github.com/keenan-eikenberry
      target: _blank
    #- text: "{{< iconify la orcid size=large >}}"
    #  href: 
    #- text: "{{< iconify academicons google-scholar size=large >}}"
    #  href:
    #- text: "{{< iconify academicons arxiv size=large >}}"
    #  href: 
    #- text: "{{< iconify academicons researchgate size=large >}}"
    #  href: 
---

I'm a mathematician and machine learning researcher. 

Currently, I'm a postdoc in the math department at Dartmouth working under the direction of Yoonsang Lee and Anne Gelb. 

My research is on theory and applications of **(self-supervised) representation learning**. Specific interests include transformer architectures, scientific applications, and code representations. 


Contact: Keenan.J.Eikenberry (at) dartmouth (dot) edu
